hero.headline: Your Dog Stays In. *Everything Else* Stays Out.
hero.subheadline: Privacy fences built right the first time — plus we handle the trees and staining too.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Fencing Plus More
services_section.subheading: Privacy fences, repairs, and the yard work that comes with it

services.title: Privacy Fence Installation
services.description: New backyard fences that keep your dog in and neighbors' eyes out. Wood or vinyl, built to last.

services.title: Fence Repairs & Gates
services.description: Fix broken sections, replace gates, and get your fence working like new again.

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Clear problem trees from your yard safely and clean up the mess afterward.

services.title: Deck Staining
services.description: Protect and refresh your deck with professional staining that looks perfect.

about.heading: Mobile Fence Pros
about.body: We're the Mobile team that shows up after hours to get your fence done. One call handles everything — fencing, tree work, staining.

reviews.name: Traci A.
reviews.text: Needed a privacy fence for my backyard. The guy came out after his day job to work on it. Before long it was up. Now I don't worry about my dog getting out!

reviews.name: Candi B.
reviews.text: Had our deck and swing stained — everything turned out perfect. Such a great company to use!

reviews.name: Mysti S.
reviews.text: They replaced my gate and another fence section. Very pleased with how it turned out and the price was great too. Highly recommend.

cta.heading: Ready for That Privacy Fence?
cta.body: Free quotes on fencing, repairs, tree removal, and deck staining. We work evenings and weekends to fit your schedule.
